scenes.narration: API call slow hai mobile pe? Bhai, har request 4 round-trips le raha — TCP+TLS handshake ka cost samjho.

Mistake: connection-per-request lagaya. Har request: TCP SYN, SYN-ACK, ACK (1 RTT), TLS ClientHello/ServerHello (1-2 RTT), then HTTP. 4G pe RTT ~100ms = 400ms before first byte. Solution: keep-alive + HTTP/2 + TLS 1.3 + 0-RTT.

Phone call soch — TCP handshake matlab 'hello? hello sun raha? haan sun raha' — teen baar bolne ke baad asli baat. TLS handshake matlab 'tu vishwasyog hai? certificate dikha. theek hai, ye raha shared key.' Phir actual data. Har naya call ye sab repeat — isliye keep-alive.

TCP: client SYN(seq=x) → server SYN-ACK(seq=y, ack=x+1) → client ACK(ack=y+1). Connection established. TLS 1.2: ClientHello → ServerHello + cert + key exchange → ClientKeyExchange + Finished → 2 RTT. TLS 1.3: 1 RTT (ClientHello+keyshare upfront), 0-RTT for resumption (early-data).

QUIC (HTTP/3) merges TCP+TLS into UDP-based — 1 RTT new connection, 0 RTT resumption. Connection pooling, TCP keep-alive (SO_KEEPALIVE), HTTP/2 multiplexing same connection. Session resumption ticket reuses key — avoid full handshake.

Cloudflare 0-RTT TLS 1.3 enabled karke API latency 30% gira diya — repeat client connections instant data send karte hain. Google QUIC pe shift kiya 2018 — YouTube buffer time 5% reduced. Mobile India me 4G pe ye 200ms differences matter.
Interview line: TCP = SYN/SYN-ACK/ACK (1 RTT), TLS 1.3 = 1 RTT new + 0-RTT resume, HTTP/2 multiplex same conn, QUIC merges all in UDP. Keep-alive mandatory for low latency.
